title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at Aptech South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at Aptech South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? Aptech South Asia Partners in Surat offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Aptech South Asia Partners:
Aptech South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aptech South Asia Partners!
